name: Tasty Taco Chicken Grill
recipeIngredient: 1 each Broiler chicken; cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Lay out chicken parts in a baking dish and bake at 350 degrees oven for 40 minutes.
2. Cool the chicken slightly, then pour sauce over it, cover, and marinate in the refrigerator for at least an hour, or overnight.
3. When ready to grill, drain excess sauce and reserve.
4. Place chicken on prepared grill, skin side up, about 8 inches from the heat.
5. Grill, turning occasionally, for about 20 minutes or until a fork can be easily inserted.
6. Brush with reserved sauce during the last 20 minutes of grilling.
7. When chicken is done, place on a platter; top with remaining sauce and sprinkle with cheese if desired.
Sauce: In a small saucepan, mix together onion, tomato sauce, taco sauce, molasses, vinegar, oil, salt, oregano, and pepper. Bring the mixture to a boil. Remove from heat and cool for 2 minutes.
